name: Nginx
description: High performance web server and reverse proxy.
compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  web:
    image: nginx:latest
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    restart: always

name: WordPress
description: The world's most popular website builder.
compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  wordpress:
    image: wordpress:latest
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    environment:
      WORDPRESS_DB_HOST: db
      WORDPRESS_DB_USER: wpuser
      WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD: wppassword
      WORDPRESS_DB_NAME: wordpress
    restart: always
  db:
    image: mariadb:10.64
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
      MYSQL_DATABASE: wordpress
      MYSQL_USER: wpuser
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: wppassword
    restart: always

name: Redis
description: In-memory data structure store, used as a database, cache, and message broker.
compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  redis:
    image: redis:alpine
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    restart: always

name: PostgreSQL
description: The World's Most Advanced Open Source Relational Database.
compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:15
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: dbuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: dbpassword
      POSTGRES_DB: mydatabase
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    restart: always

name: MySQL
description: The world's most popular open source relational database.
compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  db:
    image: mysql:8
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
      MYSQL_DATABASE: mydatabase
      MYSQL_USER: dbuser
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: dbpassword
    ports:
      - "3306:3306"
    restart: always

name: MongoDB
compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  mongo:
    image: mongo:latest
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: root
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
    ports:
      - "27017:27017"
    restart: always

name: Nextcloud
description: A safe home for all your data. Cloud storage and collaboration platform.
compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  app:
    image: nextcloud:latest
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    restart: always

name: Uptime Kuma
compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:1
    volumes:
      - ./uptime-data:/app/data
    ports:
      - "3001:3001"
    restart: always

name: Gitea
description: Git with a cup of tea. A painless self-hosted Git service.
compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  server:
    image: gitea/gitea:latest
    environment:
      - USER_UID=1000
      - USER_GID=1000
    restart: always
    volumes:
      - ./gitea:/data
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
      - "222:22"
